metadata.title: Mood Tracker
metadata.description: Track your moods & emotions easily. Visualize tracked history and browse the past entries.

regex.source: Notice(`Error loading mood tracker entries from file ${this.filepath}: ${error}`)
regex.target: Notice(`从文件加载情绪跟踪器条目时出错 ${this.filepath}: ${error}`)

regex.source: Notice(`Error saving mood tracker data to file ${this.filepath}: ${error}`)
regex.target: Notice(`保存情绪数据到文件时出错 ${this.filepath}: ${error}`)

regex.source: Notice(`Mood Tracker: folder "${this.plugin.settings.folderPath}" not found, creating it...`)
regex.target: Notice(`情绪跟踪器: 没有找到 "${this.plugin.settings.folderPath}" 文件夹, 正在创建...`)

regex.source: Notice(`Mood Tracker: created a folder "${this.plugin.settings.folderPath}". You can change the path in the settings; for now you'll have to move mood-tracker-data.json manually. Click to dismiss`, 3e4)
regex.target: Notice(`情绪跟踪器: 新建文件夹 "${this.plugin.settings.folderPath}". 您可以在设置中更改路径；现在您必须手动移动 mood-tracker-data.json。点击取消`, 3e4)

regex.source: Notice(`No mood tracker data file found at "${this.filepath}". Creating a new data file...`)
regex.target: Notice(`没有在 "${this.filepath}" 找到情绪跟踪数据文件. 正在创建新的数据文件...`)
